meta.title: Foreign Policy & World Affairs: Grand Strategy in a New Age of Geopolitics with Edward Luttwak
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a discussion with Edward Luttwak on geopolitical challenges that have emerged in the 21st century, from competition with revisionist powers such as Russia and China to regional crises in the Caucasus and Middle East. Hudson Institute Distinguished Fellow Walter Russell Mead will moderate the conversation.
